metadata.short_desc: Manage qBittorrent downloads through AstrBot commands and one AI tool.
metadata.desc: Connects to the qBittorrent Web API for searching, magnet previews, selective downloads, task renaming, and safe deletion.

base_url.hint: For example, http://127.0.0.1:8080. Include a reverse-proxy subpath when applicable.

password.hint: Used only to authenticate with qBittorrent and never written to messages or logs.

delete_files.description: Delete downloaded files when removing a torrent
delete_files.hint: Disabled by default. Deletion requires explicit confirmation when enabled.

authorized_uids.description: AstrBot UIDs allowed to use this plugin
authorized_uids.hint: Get a UID with /sid. An empty list denies all qBittorrent operations.
